articles.title: Cardano Founder: Ethereum Will Overtake Bitcoin
articles.description: Cardano founder Charles Hoskinson has predicted a quick victory of Ethereum over Bitcoin. Charles Hoskinson talked about cryptocurrencies and why he believes ethereum is poised to overtake bitcoin in the near future. He started by talking about the speed of bitcoin transactions. Pointing to the sluggishness of the network and how slow it is in […]
